contributor_note: Seeded from common horticultural knowledge. Needs primary source verification.

habit.note: Prone to powdery mildew — ensure good air circulation and avoid overhead watering.

notes: Striking red flowers beloved by bees and hummingbirds. Leaves used like oregano and in Earl Grey-style tea. Hardy perennial. Spreads by rhizome. Mildew-resistant varieties available.
